sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43364" key="eu)a/ktin" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐάκτῑν</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῑνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n43364.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with beautiful rays</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
